title: rhinanthus major var. hirsutus
intro: Rhinanthus major var. hirsutus, also known as the hairy flowered witch's thimbleweed, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the broomrape family and is native to Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Rhinanthus major var. hirsutus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and soothe skin conditions, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Herbal preparations of Rhinanthus major var. hirsutus can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
